_comment: Synthetic HDFC credit-card MONTHLY co-brand golden vector (fabricated; no real data). Expected output captured from a live run of the web engine's hdfc reader. Monthly layout: DD/MM/YYYY| HH:MM <merchant> [+ ]C <amount> — the Rupee glyph extracts as a leading 'C' (not the amount, not part of the description); a leading '+' before the amount marks a payment/credit, its absence a spend (debit). Dates are day-first.
full_text:
HDFC Bank Credit Card
Billing Period 15 May, 2026 - 14 Jun, 2026
Card Number XXXX1234XXXXXX5678
15/05/2026| 13:30 EXAMPLE MERCHANT BANGALORE C 1,639.00
20/05/2026| 09:05 CC PAYMENT RECEIVED + C 6,738.00
